e59f7c5f-67b9-463f-938b-e9b259adf1a3.title: Geo + Recent Incident Retrieval via DVM
e59f7c5f-67b9-463f-938b-e9b259adf1a3.description: Design and implement a standards-aligned DVM workflow to retrieve incidents prioritized by user proximity and recency while keeping relay REQ filters NIP-compliant.

e59f7c5f-67b9-463f-938b-e9b259adf1a3.title: Geo + Recent Incident Retrieval via DVM - Implementation Plan

todos.title: Implement DVM geo+recent query workflow from plan
todos.description: Implement DVM geo+recent workflow per ../Eventinel-dvm/DVM_Implementation_Spec.md rev2: use NIP-90 param-tag request encoding, request/result kinds 5990/6990, response modes (refs_only|enriched|both) with precedence and parity, relay source wss://relay.eventinel.com, publish NIP-89 kind:31990 handler info, integrate app behind EXPO_PUBLIC_USE_DVM_GEO_QUERY + EXPO_PUBLIC_DVM_RESPONSE_MODE with fallback.
